prompt: The validation report found that Phase 5 of the three-package-split plan has a broken import path. The plan says to import from @prism-core/utils but the actual module exports from @prism-core/lib. Iterate on the plan to fix this.
expected_output: Presents an Iteration Needed summary identifying the trigger, current state, changes required, and impact. Updates the plan with an iteration log entry. Resumes implementation from the corrected phase.
expectations: Reads the full plan before making any changes
Presents a structured 'Iteration Needed' block with Trigger, Current State, Changes Required, and Impact
Adds an Iteration Log entry to the plan with date, reason, and specific changes
Does NOT delete existing plan content â€” uses strikethrough or annotations to preserve history
Gets user approval before resuming implementation
Resumes from the affected phase, not from the beginning
